abilities.name: Heavy Weight
abilities.details: Terros is permanently [bf]immune[/] to all slow effects.[n]However, all of his bonus movement speed is converted into bonus [ar]physical resistance[/] instead.

abilities.name: Quake Slam
abilities.details: Terros slams his twin maces in 2 straight lines, dealing [ad]physical damage[/] (scaling with [ar]physical resistance[/]) to all enemies hit and briefly [db]stunning[/] them.

abilities.name: Lithic Aegis
abilities.details: Terros hardens his scales into a dense crystalline shell, gaining a [sh]shield[/] (scaling with [ar]physical resistance[/]) for a duration.[n]While the shield is active, Terros stores a percentage of the damage he takes (maximum limit based on his [ar]physical resistance[/]). When the shield is destroyed or expires, it shatters, dealing [ad]physical damage[/] (scaling with [ar]physical resistance[/]) plus the damage stored during the absorption phase.

abilities.name: Challenging Roar
abilities.details: Terros releases a powerful roar that [db]taunts[/] nearby enemies for a short duration, forcing them to attack him.

abilities.name: Tectonic Tremor
abilities.details: Terros releases a massive seismic shockwave, dealing [ad]physical damage[/] (scaling with [ar]physical resistance[/]) to all enemies hit and [db]knocking[/] them towards himself.
